'''âm-v-y''' ('''kamavay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quittance|quittance]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-v-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quittance|quittance]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-v-y
|-
! Lemma
| kamavay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimavay|thimavay]] || [[word:jimavay|jimavay]] || [[word:shimavay|shimavay]] || [[word:kimavay|kimavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumavay|thuthumavay]] || [[word:jujumavay|jujumavay]] || [[word:shushumavay|shushumavay]] || [[word:kukumavay|kukumavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumavay|thumavay]] || [[word:jumavay|jumavay]] || [[word:shumavay|shumavay]] || [[word:kumavay|kumavay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thumavay|thumavay]] || [[word:jumavay|jumavay]] || [[word:shumavay|shumavay]] || [[word:kumavay|kumavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:themavay|themavay]] || [[word:jemavay|jemavay]] || [[word:shemavay|shemavay]] || [[word:kemavay|kemavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothomavay|thothomavay]] || [[word:jojomavay|jojomavay]] || [[word:shoshomavay|shoshomavay]] || [[word:kokomavay|kokomavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomavay|thomavay]] || [[word:jomavay|jomavay]] || [[word:shomavay|shomavay]] || [[word:komavay|komavay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomavay|thomavay]] || [[word:jomavay|jomavay]] || [[word:shomavay|shomavay]] || [[word:komavay|komavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmavay|thĂŠmavay]] || [[word:jĂŠmavay|jĂŠmavay]] || [[word:shĂŠmavay|shĂŠmavay]] || [[word:kĂŠmavay|kĂŠmavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathamavay|thathamavay]] || [[word:jajamavay|jajamavay]] || [[word:shashamavay|shashamavay]] || [[word:kakamavay|kakamavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamavay|thamavay]] || [[word:jamavay|jamavay]] || [[word:shamavay|shamavay]] || [[word:kamavay|kamavay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamavay|thamavay]] || [[word:jamavay|jamavay]] || [[word:shamavay|shamavay]] || [[word:kamavay|kamavay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shamavay|shamavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshamavay|goshamavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishamavay|gokishamavay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shamavaynĂŒ|shamavaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshamavaynknĂŒ|goshamavaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavaynĂŒ|gokishamavaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shamavayshĂ«|shamavayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshamavaynkshĂ«|goshamavaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishamavayshĂ«|gokishamavayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavayro|shamavayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavaynkro|goshamavaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavayro|gokishamavayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavaymu|shamavaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavaynkmu|goshamavaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavaymu|gokishamavaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shamavaysher|shamavaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshamavaynksher|goshamavaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishamavaysher|gokishamavaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shamavayng|shamavayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshamavaynkng|goshamavaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishamavayng|gokishamavayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shamavayya|shamavayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshamavaynkya|goshamavaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishamavayya|gokishamavayya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shamavayyam|shamavayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshamavaynkyam|goshamavaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishamavayyam|gokishamavayyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavaynĂŒshĂ«|shamavaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshamavaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishamavaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavaynĂŒro|shamavaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavaynknĂŒro|goshamavaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavaynĂŒro|gokishamavaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavaynĂŒmu|shamavaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavaynknĂŒmu|goshamavaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavaynĂŒmu|gokishamavaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavayshĂ«nĂŒ|shamavayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshamavaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishamavayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavayshĂ«ro|shamavayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavaynkshĂ«ro|goshamavaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavayshĂ«ro|gokishamavayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavayshĂ«mu|shamavayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavaynkshĂ«mu|goshamavaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavayshĂ«mu|gokishamavayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavayronĂŒ|shamavayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavaynkronĂŒ|goshamavaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavayronĂŒ|gokishamavayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavayroshĂ«|shamavayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavaynkroshĂ«|goshamavaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavayroshĂ«|gokishamavayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shamavayromu|shamavayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshamavaynkromu|goshamavaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishamavayromu|gokishamavayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shamavaymunĂŒ|shamavaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshamavaynkmunĂŒ|goshamavaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishamavaymunĂŒ|gokishamavaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shamavaymushĂ«|shamavaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshamavaynkmushĂ«|goshamavaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishamavaymushĂ«|gokishamavaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shamavaymuro|shamavaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshamavaynkmuro|goshamavaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishamavaymuro|gokishamavaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
